top_signals.title: New York Tax on NYC Cash Home Purchases Close to Collapsing
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg's Nacha Cattan joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." A proposal to levy a new tax on all-cash real estate transactions over $1 million in New York City is likely to be dropped from the state budget, according to people familiar with the negotiations.  (Source: Bloomberg)
